title: Chicken and Ukrainian Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring tender chicken and pillowy dumplings.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and salt.
Add warm water and mix until dough forms.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place 1-2 tablespoons of sour cream mixture in the center of each circle.
Add a sprinkle of grated cheese and chopped dill on top.
Fold dough over filling to form a half-circle and press edges to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Gently add dumplings to boiling water and cook for 10-12 minutes.
Remove dumplings from water with a slotted spoon and drain off excess water.
Serve hot with chicken breasts, sliced and sautéed in butter until cooked through.
